jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Grofers
jsonLd.description:
Grofers invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Grofers:
Grofers is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers!
